lines.en_lit: And murderer himself, from where we It is reason, A certain came before Rava. He said to The master of the village said to me: Kill so-and-so, and if not I will kill you. said to him: Let yourself be killed, and you should not kill. What did you see that your blood is redder Perhaps the blood of that man is redder,

A certain pregnant woman smelled came before Rabbi He said to those Go and whisper to her that today is Yom Kippur. They whispered to her, and this whispering helped; read about “Before I formed you in the belly I knew you, came out of Rabbi Yoḥanan.
A certain pregnant woman smelled came before Rabbi Ḥanina He said to them: Whisper to her she did not accept the whisper read about
